categories.name: LAUNCH_APP
categories.precondition: Device idle on a top-level launcher surface; target app may not be on home screen
abstract_steps: Invoke a direct app-launch mechanism referencing the target application by its user-visible label
Look for app icon on home screen
If absent, open the all-apps drawer (swipe up) or access the full app list
Tap the correct app icon (avoid lookalike shortcuts from widgets)
Wait for any splash/initialization screen
Verify the expected app landing screen is shown
failure_modes: Direct launch no-ops silently when target cannot be resolved
A different application with a similar name is launched instead
Tapping a search-widget icon that opens a different app
Triggering long-press home menu instead of swipe
Acting before app finishes loading
Repeated retries without changing strategy
verification_checklist: Landing screen of target application visible
Main UI of target app is visible
Expected primary controls / characteristic UI elements are present

categories.name: CAPTURE_MEDIA
abstract_steps: Ensure correct mode (photo vs video) via mode selector
Apply optional pre-capture settings (zoom, timer, grid, lens switch)
Trigger primary capture control
For timed/long captures, wait the required duration
Stop/finalize capture if applicable
failure_modes: Capturing in the wrong mode
Tap on capture control not registering; retry needed
Stopping recording prematurely or too late
verification_checklist: Thumbnail of new media appears
Capture control returns to idle state
Recording timer reaches required duration before stop

categories.name: TOGGLE_SETTING
categories.precondition: Inside the target application; quick options or settings menu reachable
abstract_steps: Reveal the overflow/options menu from the top-level UI
Navigate to the configuration area
Locate the toggle/cycle control for the desired feature
Tap to enable/cycle to desired state
Close menu and verify on the main UI
failure_modes: Overflow menu missed
Misreading slashed icon as enabled
Cycling past the desired state
Toggling the wrong icon
Toggle already in desired state and action has no visible effect
Control hidden behind a subsection
verification_checklist: Toggle visually reflects desired state (on/off indicator)
Visible indicator (label/value/overlay) reflects new state
Behavior changes as expected on the main surface
Associated UI updates (e.g., theme changes)

categories.name: SELECT_FROM_OPTION_LIST
categories.precondition: Settings page with selectable list entries or a configuration row that presents a single-choice dialog
abstract_steps: Navigate to the relevant settings submenu / configuration area
Open the specific entry / configuration row to reveal a list of choices
Select the desired value (e.g., highest/lowest target option)
Confirm and return; repeat for related entries
Dismiss dialog if needed
failure_modes: Opening the wrong entry (e.g., video vs photo)
Misidentifying the maximum/minimum option
Wrong option clicked
Dialog closes without selection if tap misses
Dialog dismissed without confirming selection
Row not scrolled into view
verification_checklist: Each related entry shows the intended value
Configuration row shows the new selected value
Dialog closes after selection
No CANCEL was the final action on the dialog

categories.name: VIEW_LAST_ITEM
categories.precondition: At least one item exists in the app's media list
abstract_steps: Use the gallery/last-item shortcut from the capture surface
Confirm the most recent item is displayed
failure_modes: Opening the wrong gallery (system vs in-app)
Tapping when no item exists yet
verification_checklist: Item preview, action bar (share/edit/delete), and metadata access are visible

categories.name: QUERY_METADATA
categories.precondition: Item is open in a viewer
abstract_steps: Open the overflow/more options menu
Select the details/info action
Read required fields from the dialog
failure_modes: Tapping in immersive view hides UI controls
Menu closing before selection registers
Returning wrong field value
verification_checklist: Required field is present and value is read verbatim
Units/format match the question

categories.name: DELETE_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Item is open in a viewer
abstract_steps: Tap the delete/trash control
Confirm if prompted
Verify removal indicator
failure_modes: Deleting the wrong item if list wasn't sorted by recency
Missing confirmation step
verification_checklist: Snackbar/toast indicating deletion
Returning to capture surface or list without the item

categories.name: EDIT_ENTRY_VIA_CHOOSER
categories.precondition: Item open in viewer with an edit action
abstract_steps: Trigger edit action
From the app chooser, pick the requested editor
Confirm with one-time use (avoid setting default unless asked)
failure_modes: Choosing 'Always' inadvertently
Selecting a different editor than requested
verification_checklist: Target editor's UI loads with the item

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO_SUBSECTION
categories.precondition: Inside the app with a known menu structure
abstract_steps: Open the main/overflow menu
Drill into the targeted submenu
Verify the section title
failure_modes: Menu tap not registering
Mistaking a tooltip target for the menu
verification_checklist: Header text of subsection matches the goal

categories.name: RECOVER_FROM_WRONG_APP
abstract_steps: Close the wrong app via X/back/Home
Re-enter the app drawer instead of widgets
Launch the correct app icon
failure_modes: Repeatedly clicking the same wrong shortcut
Launcher becoming unresponsive after rapid actions
verification_checklist: Target app's main UI is now visible

categories.name: SELECT_CONTENT_ITEM
categories.precondition: Application requires selecting a piece of external content (e.g., a file/photo) to proceed
abstract_steps: Trigger the content picker from the application
Browse available items or switch source
Choose a candidate item
Wait for the application to load it
failure_modes: Item cannot be loaded (corrupted/unsupported)
No items available in current source
Permission not granted to access storage
verification_checklist: Editor/consumer view of the selected item is presented
No error dialog present

categories.name: RECOVER_FROM_BLOCKING_DIALOG
categories.precondition: A modal dialog (error or info) is blocking interaction
abstract_steps: Dismiss the modal via its affirmative/close button
Reassess state
Take an alternative path instead of repeating the exact action
failure_modes: Looping: dismissing and immediately retrying the same failing action
Mistaking modal buttons for other controls
verification_checklist: Modal no longer present
Underlying screen interactive again

categories.name: ABANDON_TASK_WHEN_BLOCKED
categories.precondition: Repeated alternative attempts fail due to environment-level issue
abstract_steps: Detect a repeating failure signature
Try at least one alternative source/option
If still failing, mark task infeasible rather than loop
failure_modes: Endless retry loops consuming steps
False positive marking feasible tasks infeasible too early
verification_checklist: At least one distinct alternative tried
Clear evidence the blocker is environmental, not a UI navigation mistake
